name: 17.5"x11" Assembled Ceramic Table Lamp Gray - Threshold™: Bud-Shaped Base, No Assembly Required, UL Listed
description:
Lighten up your space with this Gray Medium Assembled Ceramic Table Lamp from Threshold™. This ceramic table lamp makes a welcome addition to your indoor lighting. It features a glossy bud-shaped base with a gray speckled design for sophisticated, chic flair. The white drum shade diffuses light for a soft, ambient glow, while the one-way light setting with a simple on/off switch allows for easy operation. Place it on the side table next to your sofa or console in your living room for an inviting look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
